product_names: Forget resolutions. This one actually works.
ad_copy:
👉 New year, new goals, but this one actually happens.
Order our Neck Cream today. Use it twice daily. See results in 4-6 weeks.

That's it. 
No gym membership. No meal prep. No willpower required after checkout.
Just clinical-grade skincare that actually works:
✨ Firms sagging skin appearance in 4 weeks

Or keep saying "next year." Your call. ⏰
